title: CanonicalRegistryV1
description: Append-only canonical object registry. Lane-keyed arrays. Objects are persisted exactly as emitted by transformation agents.
$comment:
Governing contract: ORCHESTRATOR-EXECUTION-CONTRACT.md Section IV Step 3,
Section IX; GLOBAL CANONICAL IMMUTABILITY LOCK (append-only rule).

APPEND-ONLY: "Registry cardinality may increase only through new canonical
mint events." Objects in these arrays must never be modified after insertion.

LANE KEYS match ORCHESTRATOR-FINAL-REPORT-CONTRACT.md canonicalOutputs shape:
CPS / CME / CSN / StructuralEnvironment / MediaContext

Item schemas are NOT validated here — items are validated by their respective
canonical schemas (cps.schema.json, cme.schema.json, etc.) at write time.
This registry schema validates structure only.

ORDERING: Arrays must be sorted by canonicalId ascending when written.
Required for determinismChecksum stability across replays per
ORCHESTRATOR-FINAL-REPORT-CONTRACT.md Section V.

MediaContext array is a stub pending MFU contract authoring (Phase 0.4 deferral).

CPS.description: Canonical Pressure Signals. Append-only. Sorted by canonicalId ascending.

CME.description: Canonical Media Events. Append-only. Sorted by canonicalId ascending.

CSN.description: Canonical Standalone Narratives. Append-only. Sorted by canonicalId ascending.

StructuralEnvironment.description: Structural Environment Canonical Units (CSE). Append-only. Note: CSE lastConfirmed field is the only permitted post-mint mutation — this occurs at STA dedup resolution, not at registry level.

MediaContext.description: STUB — pending MFU canonical contract authoring (Phase 0.4 deferral). Array must be present and empty until MFU-1.0 is implemented.
